nasb.text: So also like this plague will be the plague on the horse, the mule, the camel, the donkey and all the cattle that will be in those camps.

esv.text: And a plague like this plague shall fall on the horses, the mules, the camels, the donkeys, and whatever beasts may be in those camps.

cnv.text: 照樣，像這類的災疫也必臨到馬匹、騾子、駱駝、驢和在營中的一切牲畜身上。

ccb.text: 同样的瘟疫也必降在马匹、骡子、骆驼、驴和营中的其他牲畜身上。
